title: Firecrawl API Reference: Introduction
notes: Defines v2 API base URL, authentication, core endpoints, and response-code model.

title: Firecrawl API Reference: Scrape
notes: Describes single-URL scraping, formats, content cleaning, cache controls, waits, timeouts, and browser interaction handoff.

title: Firecrawl API Reference: Crawl
notes: Defines site crawling options: include/exclude paths, sitemap mode, depth, limit, external links, subdomains, webhooks, and scrape options.

title: Firecrawl API Reference: Get Crawl Status
notes: Defines crawl job status fields, result pagination, page metadata, credits used, and per-page errors.

title: Firecrawl API Reference: Map
notes: Defines URL mapping, sitemap behavior, query-parameter handling, subdomain inclusion, limits, and URL metadata.

title: Firecrawl API Reference: Search
notes: Documents web search, optional scraping of results, search operators, categories, time filters, and domain filters.

title: Firecrawl API Reference: Batch Scrape
notes: Defines multi-URL batch scraping, invalid URL handling, max concurrency, and webhook events.

title: Firecrawl Guide: Choosing the Data Extractor
notes: Compares /agent, /extract, and /scrape JSON mode by URL knowledge, scope, sync/async behavior, cost model, and recommended scenarios.

title: Firecrawl Features: Monitoring
notes: Describes recurring scrape/crawl monitors, page-level change states, webhook/email notifications, schedules, and estimated credits.

title: Firecrawl Features: Interact after scraping
notes: Explains scrape-to-interact flow, scrapeId, prompt/code execution, live view URLs, and session stop behavior.

title: Firecrawl API Reference: Errors
notes: Defines error response shape, retryable statuses, Retry-After handling, and exponential backoff guidance.

title: Firecrawl Docs: Rate Limits
notes: Documents per-plan concurrent browser limits, max queued jobs, API rate limits, and queue timeout implications.

title: Firecrawl Developer Guide: LangChain
notes: Shows scrape + chat, chains, tool calling, and structured data extraction patterns.

title: firecrawl/firecrawl GitHub Repository
notes: Documents repository positioning, SDK examples, AGPL-3.0 licensing, cloud resources, and self-hosting links.

title: MongoDB Vector Search Overview
notes: Defines semantic, hybrid, and generative search use cases; embedding storage; vector indexes; ANN/ENN; pre-filtering; and Automated Embedding.

title: Integrate MongoDB with LangChain
notes: Shows MongoDBAtlasVectorSearch setup, connection-string and collection patterns, automated embedding option, and retriever usage.

title: MongoDB Vector Search: How to Perform Hybrid Search
notes: Documents combining vector and full-text results with $rankFusion and $scoreFusion, limitations, and version requirements.

title: Firecrawl Playground
notes: Public UI screenshot captured locally for slide illustration.
